description: Composition Blue sleeveless jacket made of 100% cotton, has a collar with a buttoned front placket, two patch pockets on the chest with button closures, two insert pockets on the sides, adjustable buttoned flaps on the hem and stitch detailing Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash or machine wash separately inside out with warm water below 40 degrees using a mild detergent Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations For an authentic denim experience, this jacket from basics is the perfect piece for winter versatility. Pair it with jeans and suede shoes, or wear unbuttoned with a monochrome shirt and form fitting jeans. Ankle high boots look best with this piece. Model statistics The product is a a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
